scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm run build:web && pnpm dlx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project sarbedutech
scripts.preview:web: pnpm run build:web && pnpm dlx firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy preview --project sarbedutech
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
